name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.FallOverWallHelper.RollingBackThr
summary: Value of the angular velocity about the wallEgde above which the character is considered as rolling backwards i.e. goes in to fow_RollingBack state.
remarks:
Default value = 0.5f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
